name: WhatsApp Business Verification Badge Scam
description: Scammer impersonating a WhatsApp Business representative to steal API keys and Facebook Business Manager admin credentials

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I am a WhatsApp Business representative. We are offering verified green tick badges for qualifying business accounts.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: My page qualifies? How do I apply?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Send me your WhatsApp Business API key and your Facebook Business Manager admin credentials at verified-wa-badge.com/apply.
